title: EQ - Dialog for "i" button is present and can be closed
scenario: EQ info dialog appears and dismisses when tapping the "i" icon in Device Settings > EQ tab
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app with an EQ-supporting device connected.
Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer (EQ) tab.
Tap the 'i' icon next to the EQ headline.
Observe the dialog that appears centered over the EQ controls.
Tap the dialog or anywhere on the screen to close it.
expected: A dialog appears centered over the EQ controls with text explaining that EQ enhances clarity by adjusting frequency for preferred sound signature and that changes affect music streaming, not telephony. Tapping the dialog or anywhere on the screen closes it.
